title: Evangelion 30 Filmbook Images
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Evangelion 3.0 Filmbook Images             Quote Post by Psycho » Sat Nov 17, 2012 1:17 pm Credit goes to every anonymous that postd'em on different futaba forums, and special thanks to my friend sageru for giving me a link to the pack. Thanks you all from an spanish EVAfan. To save browser re-layout when reading the thread, hiding the images with a  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 2:05 pm Here's some scans (not mine) from the "film" pages: http://evageeks.org/images/misc/q-filmbook-scans_11-17.rar

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Nov 17, 2012 6:24 pm I was trying to stay away (still am) but accidentally visited animepaper and got bukkaked with the booklet scans. I'm out of papers myself but someone on /m/ downloaded all of them. Too lazy to archive myself because I'm getting the hell out of here ASAP before something else sprays in my eyes http://archive.foolz.us/m/thread/8450557/#q8452382 Those designs are delicious. Seeing toy designers struggle with making the gamma torso should be hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 6:27 pm I was downloading them from /a/ just right now, I'll post an archive ASAP.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 6:47 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: http://archive.foolz.us/m/thread/8450557/#q8452382

[]:             Quote Post by balofo » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:03 pm Complete HQ scans of the booklet: http://www.mediafire.com/download.php?m5v5fgjt48x3acm

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:05 pm Pinkie. Duckface. That is all im saying.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:13 pm Well, I've been ninja-ed because of my obsessive-compulsive disorders, I re-downloaded the pics with a download manager and gave them the original filenames, and my slow upload bandwidth... I could still just paste the link anyway: http://www.mediafire.com/?clf7yt8xnxf6168 Mediafire is blocking our website, we're part of the elite now, copy and paste the url to open the download page. EDIT: the guy who scanned this for Animepaper did only the illustrations, he didn't scan the screenshots from this pamphlet. RE-EDIT: Picasa gallery

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:17 pm ayy

[]:             Quote Post by dhazard » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:31 pm http://www.mediafire.com/download.php?m5v5fgjt48x3acm Complete HQ scans of the booklet (characters/evas only):

[]:             Quote Post by Amras Felagund » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:00 pm Jayfive wrote: Pinkie. Duckface. That is all im saying.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:46 pm I'm damn stunned; it's an entirely new ballgame. http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-12958.html#more

[]:             Quote Post by PainXIII12 » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:59 pm what about mark 6???

[]:             Quote Post by Logoguy » Sun Nov 18, 2012 12:51 am Jayfive wrote: Reading chan-tards lose their shit over a film most of them havent seen yet is funny to me. This is why I am here and not there.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sun Nov 18, 2012 1:16 am PainXIII12 wrote: what about mark 6???

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Nov 18, 2012 2:04 am Jayfive wrote: Reading chan-tards lose their shit over a film most of them havent seen yet is funny to me. This is why I am here and not there.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Nov 18, 2012 11:54 am Does anyone have that cover with eva in embrio pose in hq ? NVM found it on animepaper, but jezebus, 60 papers ? i remember when 30 were already too much for a scan.

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Sun Nov 18, 2012 12:53 pm Reichu wrote: Here's some scans (not mine) from the "film" pages: http://evageeks.org/images/misc/q-filmbook-scans_11-17.rar

[]: Here are pics of my entire theatrical booklet             Quote Post by os189 » Mon Nov 19, 2012 2:22 am In the gift shop, there were two books available. The regular for 800 yen, and the "expanded" for 1500. Sorry.....I am really broke til payday! I could only get the 800 yen version! But some of the pics I've seen are clearly from the deluxe one, cause it's stuff that's not in my book. So all I have is my camera phone, but you guys want me to take pics and post my entire booklet?

[]: Re: Has the entire booklet been leaked online?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 19, 2012 2:24 am os189 wrote: So all I have is my camera phone, but you guys want me to take pics and post my entire booklet?
